creator: insane@lunatic.oneinsane.net
text:
When building postfix with TLS support it will not allow relaying based
on certificate authentication. Emailed the mailing list and the author
responded to use the current version of postfix-tls which was built for
snapshot20001121. (pfixtls-0.6.27-snap20001121-0.9.6.tar.gz)

Fix: Upgrade to current version of postfix TLS. Patches are below.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try making Postfix with TLS and setup for relaying based on
certificate.
